data.title_en: Supplications for prostrating due to recitation of the Qur'an

items.chapter_title_en: Supplications for prostrating due to recitation of the Qur'an
items.arabic_text: ((سَجَدَ وَجْهِيَ لِلَّذِي خَلَقَهُ، وَشَقَّ سَمْعَهُ وَبَصَرَهُ بِحَوْلِهِ وَقُوَّتِهِ، ﴿فَتَبارَكَ اللَّهُ أَحْسَنُ الْخَالِقِينَ)).
items.english_text: (My face fell prostrate before He who created it and brought forth its faculties of hearing and seeing by His might and power.<< So Blessed is Allah, the best of creators.)

LANGUAGE_ARABIC_TRANSLATED_TEXT.raw: (Sajada wajhee lillathee khalaqahu washaqqa samAAahu wabasarahu bihawlihi waquwwatih  { tabaraka Allahu ahsanu alkhaliqeen}.)

items.chapter_title_en: Supplications for prostrating due to recitation of the Qur'an
items.arabic_text: ((اللَّهُمَّ اكْتُبْ لِي بِهَا عِنْدَكَ أَجْراً، وَضَعْ عَنِّي بِهَا وِزْراً، وَاجْعَلْهَا لِي عِنْدَكَ ذُخْراً، وَتَقَبَّلْهَا مِنِّي كَمَا تَقَبَّلْتَهَا مِنْ عَبْدِكَ دَاوُدَ)).
items.english_text: (O Allah, record for me a reward for this (prostration), and remove from me a sin.  Save it for me and accept it from me just as You had accepted it from Your servant Dawood.)
items.transliteration: (Allahummak-tub lee biha  AAindaka ajra, wadaAA  AAannee biha wizra, wajAAalha lee AAindaka thukhra, wataqabbalha minnee kama taqabbaltaha min AAabdika Dawood.)

LANGUAGE_ARABIC_TRANSLATED_TEXT.raw: (Allahummak-tub lee biha  AAindaka ajra, wadaAA  AAannee biha wizra, wajAAalha lee AAindaka thukhra, wataqabbalha minnee kama taqabbaltaha min AAabdika Dawood.)
